subject: have agents report how much effort a ticket was
instructions: and put that into ticket metadata (can be surfaced via e..g info tooltip or sth, no need to waste ui space on that)
lastOutput:
cross 4 files:

**`src/types.ts`** — Added `TicketEffort` interface (turns, toolCalls, inputTokens, outputTokens, costUsd, durationMs) and `effort?` field on `Ticket`. Added `formatDuration()` and `formatTokenCount()` helpers.

**`server/dispatcher.ts`** — Tracks effort metrics during agent execution:
- Counts unique API turns by message ID (avoids stream-json duplication bug)
- Counts tool_use blocks for tool call metric
- Captures token usage per assistant message
- Captures cost from result events
- Computes duration on completion
- Persists effort to ticket JSON on every update + final close

**`src/components/TicketCard.tsx`** — Added `EffortBadge` component: a small info icon showing turn count, with a hover tooltip revealing all metrics (turns, tool calls, duration, tokens, cost).

**`src/components/TicketDetailModal.tsx`** — Added "Agent Effort" section with a responsive grid of metric cards showing all available effort data.
